title: reg dynamic compile time crash
body:
Hi, 
I tried below case :
module test;
reg a[];
reg b[];
initial begin
b = new[3];
end
endmodule

it will crash:
ivl: eval_object.c:34: darray_new: Assertion `ivl_type_packed_dimensions(element_type) == 1' failed.

I looked at the code, in PWire::elaborate_sig . found that for reg a[],  packed_dims will always be empty.

BTW， could you please tell me how to use gdb with iverilog

Thanks
